data_coverage_summary: Addepar API has public documentation that indicates advisory and portfolio workflows across accounts, portfolios, positions, transactions. Public developer/docs portal.
buyer_guidance: Use this surface for portfolio, account, and reporting integration inside wealth-management workflows. Addepar should be treated as a rest api surface for advisory and portfolio workflows.
overview: Public documentation reviewed for Addepar API indicates Public developer/docs portal. The documented surface aligns with advisory and portfolio workflows and covers accounts, portfolios, positions, transactions. Asset data is Unsupported. Telemetry data is Unsupported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The public documentation indicates advisory and wealth workflows around client accounts, positions, portfolios, and reporting or exchange actions.
data_points: Integration metadata for downstream advisory workflows

ingest_considerations: The public source for Addepar API is documentation-oriented, so live access still depends on vendor-issued credentials, tenant configuration, or customer enablement.
This row is modeled as advisory and portfolio workflows, so downstream integrations should scope data collection and writeback around those documented business workflows.
No exact public machine-readable JSON or YAML artifact was confirmed during this pass, so the documentation URL remains the primary evidence anchor.
